title: Encourage session_id propagation in fab_plan_context — tool description + AGENTS.md guidance
description: Discovery: planContextInputSchema already accepts optional session_id (api-contracts.ts:117-120) and the emitter forwards it (services/plan-context.ts:228), but AI MCP clients are NOT passing session_id in their fab_plan_context calls — verified via real events.jsonl in pcf where recent plan_context events lack session_id field. This task improves session_id propagation WITHOUT a breaking change: (1) upgrade Zod description on session_id field from passive to imperative; (2) add explicit instruction in .fabric/AGENTS.md cite policy section to pass session_id when calling fab_plan_context; (3) the new wording in TASK-03 archive-hint must degrade gracefully when session_id is missing.

files.change: Replace description from 'Optional caller-provided session id for Event Ledger records' to 'Recommended: pass the current client session id (Claude Code: $session_id; Codex: corresponding identifier) — enables cross-session debt tracking in fab doctor and accurate archive-hint cross-session count. Falls back gracefully if omitted.'

files.target: 知识库(KB) 两步式 Usage section
files.change: After the `fab_plan_context(paths=[...])` two-step usage instruction, add a new bullet: '- **session_id**: 调用 `fab_plan_context` 时, 务必把当前 client session id 作为 `session_id` 参数传入(Claude Code 的 session id 在 stdin payload 中, Codex 的对应 identifier 同理)。这能让 `fab doctor --archive-history` 与 archive-hint hook 准确识别跨会话 debt 状态。'

files.target: managed block synced via fab install
files.change: Mirror the AGENTS.md addition in the template source — fab install will sync this to all 3 client managed blocks on next user install.

implementation: Update api-contracts.ts L117-L120 description string per files[].change.
Add session_id bullet to .fabric/AGENTS.md after the existing fab_plan_context usage paragraph.
Find the AGENTS.md template source (packages/cli/templates/.fabric/AGENTS.md or similar — verify path via `fd AGENTS.md packages/cli/templates`); mirror change.
Verify api-contracts.test.ts (if exists) still passes — description is metadata, no runtime semantics change.
Verify zh-CN i18n locale doesn't need update — this is rule prose, not class-1-5 UX text.

reference.pattern: rc.20 cite policy added .fabric/AGENTS.md rules; rc.24 also added cite contract guidance. rc.25 adds session_id passing guidance in the same Managed Block.
reference.examples: rc.20 cite policy two-step instruction is the structural precedent for the new session_id instruction.

rationale.chosen_approach: Additive documentation + descriptor upgrade. No schema change (session_id remains optional for backward compat). AI compliance via AGENTS.md is consistent with how cite policy was rolled out.
alternatives_considered: Make session_id required on input schema (rejected: breaking change, old AI clients break)
Server-side fallback reading session_id from MCP request extra (rejected: MCP SDK access pattern unclear, fragile across SDK versions)
Skip entirely and degrade archive-hint copy (rejected: weakens the rc.25 user-value proposition)
decision_factors: AI compliance via prose policy has rc.20/rc.24 precedent of working well
Tool description upgrade is the lightest possible nudge
rationale.tradeoffs: AI compliance is best-effort, not enforced. Mitigation: TASK-03 archive-hint copy gracefully degrades when session_id missing (`跨多个会话累计` instead of `跨 N 个会话累计`).

manual_checks: Read updated api-contracts.ts description in a Claude Code session — verify it shows up in tool annotations
Dogfood: trigger fab_plan_context in a fresh Claude Code session, check events.jsonl tail for session_id presence
success_metrics: api-contracts.ts session_id description contains string 'session id' AND 'cross-session'
.fabric/AGENTS.md contains string 'session_id' in 知识库 section

criteria: api-contracts.ts session_id field description contains string 'Recommended'
.fabric/AGENTS.md contains string '**session_id**' in 知识库 section
Commit msg: 'docs(rc25): encourage session_id propagation in fab_plan_context (TASK-02)'
